ksa_text: Knowledge of root cause analysis methods for data quality failures, including source system analysis, data transformation logic review, process failure identification, and remediation strategy development.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-005 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4231 is insufficient to establish relevance to health informatics, clinical data analysis, and healthcare BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.423, ddat=0.419, onet=0.413) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4231 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DQ-domain KSA DQ-K-005 (composite 0.4231) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4231 for DQ domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Health Informatics Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DQ domain KSA at composite 0.4231 is not a standard requirement for Health Informatics Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4231, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
